syntax_262.creator: tim740
syntax_262.title: Spawn Villager With Profession
syntax_262.description:
Spawns a villager or zombie villager(1.9) allowing you to choose the profession

Professions: 
https://skripthub.net/docs/?search=id:142
syntax_262.syntax_pattern: spawn a (zombie villager|villager) with profession %profession% at %location%

en:
Spawns a villager or zombie villager(1.9) allowing you to choose the profession

Professions: 
https://skripthub.net/docs/?search=id:142

syntax_142.creator: tim740
syntax_142.title: Profession
syntax_142.description: All Professions for Villagers/Zombie Villagers (Profession skUtilities)
syntax_142.syntax_pattern: NORMAL, FARMER, LIBRARIAN, PRIEST, BLACKSMITH, BUTCHER, HUSK

en: All Professions for Villagers/Zombie Villagers (Profession skUtilities)
